tasks.return_to_hq: Return to the Dirty Hose Headquarters

bonuses.perfect_time_tip: Finished the contract in perfect time!
bonuses.good_time_tip: Finished the contract in a really good time!
bonuses.vehicle_care_tip: Bonus for taking great care of the work truck
bonuses.vehicle_damage_tip: Vehicle suffered major damage during the contract
bonuses.top_washer_tip: You've cleaned the most during this contract
bonuses.team_size_bonus_tip: Bonus for working in a team
bonuses.experience_tip: Bonus unlocked by reaching a high job level

stars_5: Outstanding work out there! That's exactly the kind of efficiency I like to see.
Now THAT'S how it's done! You're making me look good to the clients.
Incredible job! You might just be the best washer I've got on the team.
stars_4: Solid work today, keep it up.
Good job out there. The client's going to be happy with this one.
Nice and quick. You're getting the hang of this.
stars_3: Alright, not bad, but I know you can do better. Keep at it.
Job's done. Nothing special, but it'll do.
Average work, average pay. You want bonuses? Pick up the pace next time.
stars_2: You finished it. But at what cost. You really must improve for the next one.
Yeah. That is NOT how its done. Do better.
job_short: Quick one today, but those keep the company running.
Small job, easy money. Can't complain about that.
These little contracts add up, you know. Bread and butter work.
job_medium: Decent sized contract, good honest work.
Standard job, nothing too crazy. Just how I like it.
That's the kind of work that pays the bills.
job_long: That was a big one. Probably wasn't fun, but those bring in the real money.
Massive contract right there. The client paid top dollar for that kind of work.
That's what I call a proper job. Those big ones keep the lights on around here.
vehicle_perfect: The truck came back in perfect condition too. I appreciate you taking care of our equipment.
Nice to see the vehicle without a scratch. That's the professional attitude I'm looking for.
Truck looks good as new, that's going in your file as a positive.
vehicle_damaged: Now about the truck... what the hell happened? I'm taking the repair costs out of your pay.
You banged up the vehicle pretty good though. That's coming out of your cut, try to be more careful next time.
But, the truck came back looking like it went through a warzone. Repairs aren't free, so that's on you.
vehicle_missing: And where's the truck?! I will have to send someone to find it. That little adventure is coming out of your paycheck.
You left the vehicle god knows where. Do you know how much time I will waste tracking it down? That's a deduction.
No truck, no explanation... I don't even want to know. Just know you're paying for the retrieval.

outfit.required: You must be wearing your work uniform
outfit.not_unlocked: You have not unlocked this outfit yet

water_tank.empty: You're out of water! Refill at the vehicle.

cancellation_ban.applied: You have been suspended from starting new contracts for {{time}} minutes.
cancellation_ban.blocked: You are suspended from starting new contracts. Time remaining: {{time}} minute(s)
